description: Hard pre-filters before candle/volume structure scoring. Used to remove obvious junk and reduce noise.

minimum_liquidity.notes: Tune up or down later depending on universe size.

minimum_price.notes: Optional. Leave off at first unless penny names pollute output.

minimum_rs_score.notes: Basic relative strength floor before full scoring.

exclude_warning_status.notes: Exclude names with exchange warning or trading restrictions.

exclude_extreme_illiquid.notes: Basic floor to eliminate dead charts.

exclude_recent_major_breakdown.notes: Avoid names with recently confirmed structure loss.

exclude_near_breakdown_zone.notes: Avoid names sitting too close to obvious breakdown risk unless manually overridden.

sector_state_allowed.notes: Only pass candidates from sectors worth attention.

exclude_gap_damage.notes: Optional filter for damaged charts after sharp downside gaps.

manual_exclusion_list.notes: Ty can add specific names here if needed.
